name: DolEx Dollar Express
description_short: Sacramento, CA's DolEx Dollar Express at 5040 Franklin Blvd serves the community with check cashing and financial services, open daily.
description_long:
DolEx Dollar Express in Sacramento, CA is conveniently located at 5040 Franklin Blvd, serving the Franklin Boulevard corridor with accessible check-cashing services. The Sacramento location sits in a standalone facility, making it easy to access during peak business hours. Open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 7:00 PM and Saturday through Sunday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, this branch accommodates both weekday professionals and weekend shoppers.

At this Sacramento, CA location, customers can cash checks, access quick money services, and handle time-sensitive financial needs with minimal wait times. The staff is trained to handle various check types and can provide guidance on available services. For questions specific to the Franklin Blvd branch or to confirm hours before your visit, call +1 800-481-1946.

If you live or work near Franklin Blvd in Sacramento, this DolEx Dollar Express branch offers a reliable alternative to traditional banking for check cashing and quick financial solutions. Bring a valid photo ID for any check-cashing transaction, and note that the weekend hours (9 AM - 6 PM on Saturdays and Sundays) make it convenient for those with busy weekday schedules.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 7:00 PM accommodate working consumers
Multiple financial services available at single location (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers)
Toll-free phone number (800-481-1946) for customer accessibility
Weekend hours on Saturday and Sunday provide flexibility for non-traditional schedules
Physical Sacramento location provides in-person service for local customers
Web presence at dolex.com suggests online service information availability
Open same-day service hours (8:30 AM start time) for immediate financial needs
cons: Check-cashing services typically charge per-transaction fees that can exceed bank costs for frequent users
Limited geographic availability—single Sacramento location restricts access for non-local customers
Website information is minimal; detailed fee structures and service terms not publicly disclosed
No information about competitive rates or fee comparisons relative to other check-cashing services
No indication of digital/mobile banking alternatives for customers preferring online services
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts
Gig economy workers and independent contractors needing quick access to cash from irregular payments
Sacramento-area residents and businesses requiring check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers
Consumers seeking single-location services for multiple financial transactions (check cashing + money orders + wire transfers)
diagnosis: DolEx Dollar Express is best for Sacramento-area consumers without traditional bank accounts who need quick check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers at extended hours. The primary caveat is that check-cashing services charge per-transaction fees that accumulate quickly for frequent users, making a low-cost bank account or credit union membership potentially more economical for regular financial transactions.
meta_description: DolEx Dollar Express at 5040 Franklin Blvd, Sacramento, CA. Check cashing with extended weekday hours.
